items.title: Shnaider stuns No. 1 Sabalenka at French Open
items.summary: Top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka, up a set and two breaks in the second, suffered a shocking defeat in three sets to Diana Shnaider in the French Open quarterfinals on Wednesday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Swiss appeal to U.S. embassy for Embolo WC visa
